name: Buttermilk Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine well the buttermilk, corn syrup, lemon juice, sugar, and zest.
2. Freeze the mixture in an ice-cream freezer according to directions.
3. Pack the sherbet into an air-tight container and freeze it until firm.
4. Serve scoops of the sherbet garnished with strips of zest.
Makes about 1 1/2 quarts. A 1968 Gourmet Magazine favorite.
